title: NRL sandboxed CLI control preferences v1
description: Written by native `nrl control` under build/control/preferences.json (operator hints only).

updated_unix.description: Wall clock when the file was last written (seconds since Unix epoch).

power_until_unix.description: If greater than current time, nrlpy may treat recommended_profile as active for benches when hints are enabled.

throttle_hint.description: conservative: CPU-throttle style intent; gated: sticky conservative bias (e.g. volatile-market phrasing).
